channel.title: PET Imaging on Kayra Sari
channel.description: Recent content in PET Imaging on Kayra Sari

item.title: RadiaTED: Compton Scattering & Timing Resolution
item.description: A student-led experiment at CERN's T9 beamline to separate geometric and detector-induced contributions to timing resolution in Compton-based TOF systems, with direct implications for next-generation TOF-PET scanners.
